name: Pumpkin Pie/TVFN
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300 degrees.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the pureed pumpkin, creme fraiche, brown sugar, salt, cinnamon, ginger, and cloves. Whisk together until thoroughly blended.
3. Stir in the eggs, vanilla, and brandy or rum. Whisk again until thoroughly blended.
4. Mound the pumpkin mixture into the pie shell.
5. Gently jiggle the pan to help the filling settle.
6. Bake for about 1 hour, until set in the center.
